title: AN ACT NAMING THE HIGHWAY CONNECTING ORMOC CITY TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF MERIDA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AS THE SENATOR RAFAEL C. MARTINEZ MEMORIAL HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 19908 / 87 OG No. 18, 2464 (May 6, 1991)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6979, March 18, 1991 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE HIGHWAY CONNECTING ORMOC CITY TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF MERIDA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AS THE SENATOR RAFAEL C. MARTINEZ MEMORIAL HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The highway connecting Ormoc City to the Municipality of Merida, Province of Leyte, is hereby named as the Senator Rafael C. Martinez Memorial Highway.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon Its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 18, 1989 and August 11, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of General House of Representatives

Approved: March 18, 1991

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
